metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.description: Detects suspicious void and refund patterns at POS terminals indicative of employee fraud or skimming. Correlates high-volume voids and refunds per employee against RetailShield_POS_CL. MITRE T1056.001.
properties.query:
// ============================================================
// RetailShield — POS Off-Hours Void / Refund Anomaly
// MITRE ATT&CK : T1056.001 — Keylogging / Input Capture (POS)
// Tactic       : Collection
// Severity     : High
// Frequency    : Every 5 minutes | Lookback: 30 minutes
// Author       : Tanvir Farhad — ShieldTech Ltd, London
// Reference    : UK retail insider fraud — employees processing late-night
//                voids to siphon cash; CIFAS insider fraud report 2024
// ============================================================

let LookbackPeriod      = 30m;
let BusinessHourStart   = 7;      // 07:00
let BusinessHourEnd     = 21;     // 21:00
let VoidRefundThresh    = 5;      // per operator per window
let HighValueThresh     = 500.0;  // GBP — high-value void/refund without override

// ── Step 1: Voids / refunds processed outside business hours ─────────────────
let AfterHoursVoids =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s in ("VOID", "REFUND", "RETURN")
    | where isnotempty(OperatorId_s)
    | extend HourOfDay = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
    | where HourOfDay < BusinessHourStart or HourOfDay >= BusinessHourEnd
    | summarize
        TransactionCount = count(),
        TotalValue       = sum(toreal(TransactionAmount_d)),
        TerminalIDs      = make_set(TerminalId_s, 5),
        TransactionTypes = make_set(TransactionType_s, 3),
        EarliestTx       = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestTx         = max(TimeGenerated)
        by OperatorId_s, StoreId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | extend ThreatSignal = "AfterHoursVoidRefund";

// ── Step 2: High-volume voids / refunds per operator in a single session ──────
let HighVolumeVoids =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s in ("VOID", "REFUND", "RETURN")
    | where isnotempty(OperatorId_s)
    | summarize
        TransactionCount = count(),
        TotalValue       = sum(toreal(TransactionAmount_d)),
        TerminalIDs      = make_set(TerminalId_s, 5),
        TransactionTypes = make_set(TransactionType_s, 3),
        EarliestTx       = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestTx         = max(TimeGenerated)
        by OperatorId_s, StoreId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | where TransactionCount >= VoidRefundThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "HighVolumeVoidRefund";

// ── Step 3: High-value void without manager override ─────────────────────────
let HighValueVoidNoOverride =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s in ("VOID", "REFUND")
    | where toreal(TransactionAmount_d) >= HighValueThresh
    | where isempty(ManagerOverrideId_s) or ManagerOverrideId_s == ""
    | extend ThreatSignal = "HighValueVoidNoOverride";

// ── Step 4: Refund to different tender type than original payment ─────────────
let TenderMismatchRefund =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s == "REFUND"
    | where isnotempty(OriginalTenderType_s) and isnotempty(RefundTenderType_s)
    | where OriginalTenderType_s != RefundTenderType_s
    | where RefundTenderType_s in ("CASH", "GIFT_CARD")  // higher-risk refund tenders
    | extend ThreatSignal = "TenderMismatchRefund";

// ── Step 5: Union all signals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
union
    (AfterHoursVoids
        | extend
            TransactionAmount_d = TotalValue,
            TerminalId_s = tostring(TerminalIDs[0]),
            ManagerOverrideId_s = "",
            OriginalTenderType_s = "", RefundTenderType_s = ""),
    (HighVolumeVoids
        | extend
            TransactionAmount_d = TotalValue,
            TerminalId_s = tostring(TerminalIDs[0]),
            ManagerOverrideId_s = "",
            OriginalTenderType_s = "", RefundTenderType_s = ""),
    (HighValueVoidNoOverride
        | extend
            TransactionCount = 1,
            TotalValue = toreal(TransactionAmount_d),
            TerminalIDs = pack_array(TerminalId_s),
            TransactionTypes = pack_array(TransactionType_s),
            EarliestTx = TimeGenerated, LatestTx = TimeGenerated,
            OriginalTenderType_s = "", RefundTenderType_s = ""),
    (TenderMismatchRefund
        | extend
            TransactionCount = 1,
            TotalValue = toreal(TransactionAmount_d),
            TerminalIDs = pack_array(TerminalId_s),
            TransactionTypes = pack_array(TransactionType_s),
            EarliestTx = TimeGenerated, LatestTx = TimeGenerated,
            ManagerOverrideId_s = "")
| extend
    AlertSeverity   = "High",
    MitreTechnique  = "T1056.001",
    MitreTactic     = "Collection",
    PlaybookTrigger = "notify_soc",
    RiskScore       = 80
| project
    Timestamp        = coalesce(EarliestTx, TimeGenerated),
    OperatorId_s,
    StoreId_s,
    TerminalId_s,
    ThreatSignal,
    TransactionCount,
    TotalValue,
    TransactionTypes,
    OriginalTenderType_s,
    RefundTenderType_s,
    ManagerOverrideId_s,
    AlertSeverity,
    MitreTechnique,
    MitreTactic,
    PlaybookTrigger,
    RiskScore
| order by Timestamp desc
